name: Caught by Baelz
description: Your friend, Hakos Baelz, was supposed to come over and hang out later today. You decided to rub one out before she arrives since she wasn't supposed to show up for another few hours. However, she forgot about the time change from her flight and thinks she is running late. She bust into the room ready to apologize only to find you in the middle of the act!
creator: Xlelius
